markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[To explore 35 taking over Lovable template creation.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=255.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**The Problem:** Growthx's current freelancers deliver low-quality templates, creating a feedback loop that consumes more of Georgemaine's time than if he built them himself.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**The Solution:** 35 will take ownership of the template creation workflow, aiming to produce high-quality, "almost custom-made" templates that attract SEO traffic.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**The Plan:** A 2-week discovery phase starts next week for 35 to define a scalable workflow. Georgemaine will provide all necessary assets and arrange payment via Renato.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)

## Topics

### The Problem: Inefficient Template Creation

  - [Growthx creates SEO-driven templates for Lovable, targeting non-technical users (e.g., wedding planners, pet shop owners) with Wix/Squarespace-level quality.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1159.0)
  - [The current workflow is inefficient:](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
      - [Georgemaine manually generates prompts for 10 templates weekly.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=371.0)
      - [Freelancers produce low-quality results that require extensive feedback, making the process a net time loss.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
  - [**Goal:** Offload this entire workflow to 35 to ensure consistent quality and free up Georgemaine's time.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)

### The Solution: 35 Takes Ownership

  - [35 will own the workflow from keyword to final template, focusing on high-quality, "almost custom-made" designs.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=649.0)
  - [**Tech Stack:** Lovable is React-based, with strong support for Tailwind and ShadCN.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [35 can use this stack or connect a custom repo.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
      - [The team agreed this stack is ideal, as AI tools (e.g., Cursor) are effective with it.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=938.0)
  - [**Scaling:** Lovable has expressed interest in app templates, creating a potential future opportunity.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=746.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Georgemaine:**](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Send "green light" email to 35 by EOW.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Arrange payment for 35's discovery phase via Renato.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Provide all necessary assets and access by Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
  - [**35:**](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
      - [Begin 2-week workflow discovery phase next week.](https://fathom.video/share/K8WdfEJ8Yg6LMfiQeNaC6zE32qwTpNQQ?tab=summary&timestamp=1547.0)
